purpose: Validate CGF generation law: log(PPL) = -alpha*kappa + beta*log(V-1) + C across 18 models
data_ref: HuggingFace: Pythia, Mamba, GPT-2, Qwen3, Falcon-H1, SmolLM2, Mistral
notes: Fixed-V r=-0.924 heavily influenced by Pythia-160M leverage point. Alpha architecture-independent (ratio=1.037). Generation law unifies classification and NTP under same Gumbel-race mechanism.
